title: Melicope crassiramis
taxonomy: Melicope crassiramis is classified within the Rutaceae family, commonly known as the citrus or rue family. This family consists of flowering plants that are primarily native to the tropics and subtropics. Melicope crassiramis belongs to the genus Melicope, which includes approximately 70 species of flowering plants. The genus Melicope is native to the Pacific Islands and southeastern Asia. The classification of Melicope crassiramis reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Rutaceae family.
